func New
type AccountID string
type Accounts struct { t *transport.Transport }
type Amount string
type Applications struct { t *transport.Transport }
type CSVError struct { Code int `json:"Code"` Errors []ErrorDetail `json:"Errors,omitempty"` ID string `json:"Id"` Message string `json:"Message"` }
type Client struct { transport *transport.Transport Accounts *Accounts Transactions *Transactions Applications *Applications DomesticPayment *DomesticPayment DomesticScheduledPayment *DomesticScheduledPayment DomesticStandingOrder *DomesticStandingOrder DraftPayment *DraftPayment FilePayment *FilePayment InternationalPayment *InternationalPayment InternationalScheduledPayment *InternationalScheduledPayment InternationalStandingOrder *InternationalStandingOrder }
type CreateDraftPaymentParams struct { ScheduledDate string `json:"scheduledDate,omitempty"` Title string `json:"title,omitempty"` }
type Currency core.Currency
type DomesticPayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type DomesticScheduledPayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type DomesticStandingOrder struct { t *transport.Transport }
type DraftPayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type DraftPaymentListResponse struct { Items []*DraftPaymentListResponseItemsItem `json:"Items"` Links *DraftPaymentListResponseLinks `json:"Links"` }
type DraftPaymentListResponseItemsItem struct { CreatedAt time.Time `json:"CreatedAt"` ID string `json:"Id"` RequestedExecutionDate string `json:"RequestedExecutionDate,omitempty"` Status DraftPaymentStatus `json:"Status"` Title string `json:"Title,omitempty"` }
type DraftPaymentListResponseLinks struct { Next string `json:"Next,omitempty"` }
type DraftPaymentResponse struct { DraftPaymentID string `json:"DraftPaymentId"` RequestedExecutionDate string `json:"RequestedExecutionDate,omitempty"` Status DraftPaymentStatus `json:"Status"` Transfers []DraftPaymentTransfer `json:"Transfers"` }
type DraftPaymentStatus string
type DraftPaymentTransfer struct { FailedReason string `json:"FailedReason,omitempty"` FailedReasonCode int `json:"FailedReasonCode,omitempty"` ID string `json:"Id"` Index int `json:"Index,omitempty"` InstructedAmount InstructedAmount `json:"InstructedAmount"` Reference string `json:"Reference"` Status DraftPaymentTransferStatus `json:"Status"` }
type DraftPaymentTransferStatus string
type EmptyBody struct { }
type Error struct { Code int `json:"Code"` ID string `json:"Id"` Message string `json:"Message"` }
type ErrorDetail struct { Errors []FieldError `json:"Errors"` Row int `json:"Row"` }
type FieldError struct { Code int `json:"Code"` Field string `json:"Field,omitempty"` Message string `json:"Message"` }
type FilePayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type GetAccountsAccountIDTransactionsParams struct { FromBookingDateTime time.Time `json:"fromBookingDateTime,omitempty"` ToBookingDateTime time.Time `json:"toBookingDateTime,omitempty"` }
type GetApplicationResponse struct { ClientID string `json:"client_id,omitempty"` IDTokenSignedResponseAlg GetApplicationResponseIDTokenSignedResponseAlg `json:"id_token_signed_response_alg,omitempty"` OrgJwksEndpoint string `json:"org_jwks_endpoint,omitempty"` OrgName string `json:"org_name,omitempty"` RedirectUris []string `json:"redirect_uris,omitempty"` RequestObjectSigningAlg GetApplicationResponseRequestObjectSigningAlg `json:"request_object_signing_alg,omitempty"` Scope string `json:"scope,omitempty"` TLSClientAuthDn string `json:"tls_client_auth_dn,omitempty"` TokenEndpointAuthMethod GetApplicationResponseTokenEndpointAuthMethod `json:"token_endpoint_auth_method,omitempty"` }
type GetApplicationResponseIDTokenSignedResponseAlg string
type GetApplicationResponseRequestObjectSigningAlg string
type GetApplicationResponseTokenEndpointAuthMethod string
type GetDistinguishedNameResponse struct { TLSClientAuthDn string `json:"tls_client_auth_dn"` }
type InstructedAmount struct { Amount Amount `json:"Amount"` Currency Currency `json:"Currency"` }
type InternationalPayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type InternationalScheduledPayment struct { t *transport.Transport }
type InternationalStandingOrder struct { t *transport.Transport }
type Links struct { Next string `json:"Next,omitempty"` Prev string `json:"Prev,omitempty"` Self string `json:"Self"` }
type ListDraftPaymentParams struct { From time.Time `json:"from,omitempty"` To time.Time `json:"to,omitempty"` Limit int32 `json:"limit,omitempty"` }
type Meta struct { TotalPages int32 `json:"TotalPages,omitempty"` }

type PaymentStatus string
type RegisterApplicationResponse struct { ApplicationType RegisterApplicationResponseApplicationType `json:"application_type,omitempty"` ClientID string `json:"client_id,omitempty"` Exp int `json:"exp,omitempty"` GrantTypes []string `json:"grant_types,omitempty"` Iat int `json:"iat,omitempty"` IDTokenSignedResponseAlg RegisterApplicationResponseIDTokenSignedResponseAlg `json:"id_token_signed_response_alg,omitempty"` Iss string `json:"iss,omitempty"` OrgJwksEndpoint string `json:"org_jwks_endpoint,omitempty"` RedirectUris []string `json:"redirect_uris,omitempty"` RequestObjectSigningAlg RegisterApplicationResponseRequestObjectSigningAlg `json:"request_object_signing_alg,omitempty"` Scope string `json:"scope,omitempty"` SoftwareStatement string `json:"software_statement,omitempty"` TLSClientAuthDn string `json:"tls_client_auth_dn,omitempty"` TokenEndpointAuthMethod RegisterApplicationResponseTokenEndpointAuthMethod `json:"token_endpoint_auth_method,omitempty"` }
type RegisterApplicationResponseApplicationType string
type RegisterApplicationResponseIDTokenSignedResponseAlg string
type RegisterApplicationResponseRequestObjectSigningAlg string
type RegisterApplicationResponseTokenEndpointAuthMethod string
type TransactionInformation string
type Transactions struct { t *transport.Transport }
